# Pre-Rollout Baseline Checklist Template

Purpose: capture stage-0 baseline evidence before canary exposure.

```text
Artifact Type: pre_rollout_baseline_checklist
Rollout ID:
Release/Change Ref:
Baseline Snapshot ID:
Environment:
Owner:
Reviewer/Approver:
Started At (UTC):
Ended At (UTC):

Pre-Rollout Checks:
- check-rollout-readiness command:
- check-rollout-readiness result (pass/fail):
- WS20 stage gate artifact path:
- WS20 stage gate result (pass/fail):
- Open blockers:
- Blocker resolution evidence:

Decision:
- Checklist Complete (true/false):
- Approved to advance (yes/no):
- Approval timestamp (UTC):
- Notes:
```
